title: Russian missile strike on Ukrainian power substation
description: Three Kh-101 cruise missiles impact 330kV substation near Kharkiv, knocking out grid for ~120,000 customers. Ukrainian air defense reports two interceptions.

title: Drone swarm targets Ukrainian energy infrastructure overnight
description: Shahed-136 drones strike thermal power plant in Dnipro region; substation fires reported. Ukrainian forces claim 18 of 24 drones intercepted.

title: Artillery duel along eastern front near Avdiivka
description: Sustained Russian artillery fire on Ukrainian positions. Counter-battery radar engagements reported through the night.

title: Israeli airstrikes on suspected Hezbollah weapons depot
description: IDF conducts precision strikes on three sites in southern Lebanon. Hezbollah confirms the loss of two operatives.

title: Houthi anti-ship missile launched at commercial vessel
description: Greek-flagged tanker reports near miss in Bab-el-Mandeb strait; CENTCOM AEGIS destroyer engages incoming threat.

title: Cyber intrusion at Ukrainian energy SOC
description: CERT-UA reports active spear-phishing campaign attributed to Sandworm-class actor targeting energy operators.

title: PRC naval flotilla transits Taiwan Strait centerline
description: Five PLAN vessels including Type 055 destroyer cross median line; Taiwan dispatches frigate to monitor.

title: Hamas rocket barrage from northern Gaza
description: Approximately 30 rockets launched toward Sderot and Ashkelon; Iron Dome intercepts the majority.

title: Iranian-built drone shot down over northern Iraq
description: US Patriot battery engages Shahed-class drone targeting Erbil airbase. No casualties reported.

title: Russian Black Sea Fleet repositions amphibious assets
description: OSINT analysts track movement of Ropucha-class LSTs from Sevastopol; possible amphibious exercise.

title: Ukrainian special forces strike fuel depot in Crimea
description: GUR claims responsibility for explosion at Russian military fuel storage facility; satellite imagery confirms damage.

title: NATO patrol intercepts Russian Tu-95 near Norwegian airspace
description: RAF Typhoons and Norwegian F-35s scramble to escort Russian strategic bombers over Barents Sea.

title: Drone strike on Russian oil refinery deep inside Voronezh Oblast
description: Long-range Ukrainian drones impact Novovoronezh refinery, causing fire visible from 30km. Output disrupted.

title: Mass protest in Tbilisi over EU accession freeze
description: Several thousand demonstrators gather at parliament; police deploy water cannon and tear gas.

title: Suspected sabotage on undersea telecom cable in Baltic
description: Two cables connecting Sweden and Lithuania severed; investigation underway. Chinese-flagged vessel reported in vicinity.

title: Wagner-affiliated forces clash with Mali army patrol
description: Ambush near Gao kills four Malian soldiers; Tuareg rebels claim responsibility.

title: DPRK launches ballistic missile into Sea of Japan
description: Short-range ballistic missile travels approximately 450km. South Korea and Japan condemn launch.

title: Russian glide bomb strike on Ukrainian frontline brigade HQ
description: FAB-1500 with UMPK kit hits brigade command post near Kupyansk; multiple casualties reported.

title: ISIS-K claims attack on Afghan ministry building
description: Suicide bomber detonates outside Ministry of Refugees in Kabul; Taliban security responds.

title: Russian forces consolidate gains around Vovchansk
description: Ground footage confirms Russian advance into northern Vovchansk; Ukrainian forces reposition.

title: Israeli airstrike on Damascus suburb
description: IDF strikes targeting IRGC logistics node; Syrian air defense reportedly engages with limited effect.

title: Suspected Iranian cyber actor targets Israeli water utility
description: CyberAv3ngers-class group probes ICS devices at water treatment plant; defenders isolate exposed PLCs.

title: Coalition airstrike on Houthi missile launch site
description: F/A-18s from CSG Eisenhower destroy two missile launchers near Hodeidah; no friendly losses.

title: Ukrainian counter-battery fire silences Russian artillery
description: HIMARS strike on Russian battery near Kreminna; secondary explosions observed.

title: PRC coast guard vessels block Philippine resupply mission
description: PCG cutters water-cannon Philippine boats near Second Thomas Shoal; collision damage reported.

title: Suspected sabotage on Polish-Lithuanian rail line
description: Track damage discovered near border; Polish counterintelligence opens investigation citing GRU activity.

title: Hezbollah rocket fire on northern Israel kibbutz
description: Burkan heavy rocket strikes structure in Kiryat Shmona; two civilians wounded.

title: Suspected Russian cyber actor breaches Polish logistics provider
description: Sandworm-class TTPs detected; CERT.PL coordinates incident response with NATO CCDCOE.

title: Russian Iskander-M strike on Ukrainian airfield
description: Ballistic missile impacts Mykolaiv-area airfield; one Su-27 reportedly damaged on the ground.

title: Diplomatic summit in Brussels on extended NATO eastern flank posture
description: NATO defense ministers convene to finalize air-defense reinforcement package for Poland and Romania.
